News.title: Ontario is home to the oldest baseball field in the world
News.summary: Tucked along the Thames River in the Ontario city ofLondonis a baseball field older than legendary MLB ballparks like Fenway Park and Wrigley Field, and officially recognized as the oldest continuously operating baseball diamond on the planet.

News.title: Saskatchewan Roughriders defeat Blue Bombers in 2nd pre-season game
